drivers.name: Hardware mix shift to lower-margin SKU

anticipated_analyst_questions: What is your confidence in the revised FY26 guide?

non_disclosure_phrases.we_do_not_disclose: We don't disclose [topic] at this granularity, but I can share that [adjacent fact].
non_disclosure_phrases.we_will_follow_up: Let me follow up with you offline so I can give you a precise answer.
